title: seruneum verbesinoides
intro: Seruneum verbesinoides, also known as Verbena bracteata, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Verbena family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Seruneum verbesinoides include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
